# Pull Request

## Summary
What does this PR change, in one or two sentences?

## AI disclosure (required — we dogfood our own standard)
Per this repository's [`ai-contribution-policy.yml`](../ai-contribution-policy.yml):

- [ ] No AI assistance was used
- [ ] AI-assisted — tool and role: <!-- e.g. "drafted with an AI coding assistant, restructured and fact-checked by hand" -->

## Attestations (required)
- [ ] **understands-change** — I can explain every part of this change if asked
- [ ] **reviewed-output** — I read the full diff before submitting, not just a summary
- [ ] **ran-tests** — where applicable; this repo is mostly prose, so mark N/A if so: <!-- N/A -->

## Type of contribution
- [ ] Policy-catalogue entry (single file in `policy-catalogue/`)
- [ ] Case study (drafted against `case-studies/TEMPLATE.md`, nominated via issue first)
- [ ] Schema change (proposed in an issue first)
- [ ] Docs / other

## Sources
For catalogue entries and case studies: primary links for every claim.
